summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. The hydrated preflight artifact contains live state for 20 listed open PRs and reports no security-sensitive hydrated refs. All hydrated PRs are independent inventory items with no safe close/merge/fix mutation available under this job's blocked actions and permissions. Five job-listed refs were not present in the preflight artifact, so those specific refs need rehydration before classification.
